entity.summary: Monad-native decentralized exchange combining spot and perpetual trading through order-book and automated-market-maker execution surfaces.
entity.notes: HEI models Monday Trade spot, perpetual, RWA, order-book, and AMM products as one exchange entity. The launch date uses the documented Monad mainnet availability date. Current first-party materials and independent protocol metrics report active spot and perpetual trading.

evidence.title: Monday Trade official documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Monday Trade as an all-in-one Monad DEX with spot and perpetual products using hybrid order-book and AMM execution.

evidence.title: Monday Trade protocol profile and trading metrics
evidence.notes: Independent protocol data reports current non-zero TVL, fees, spot DEX volume, and cumulative perpetual volume for Monday Trade on Monad.
